displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Suvai Suvai Appalam/Keropok/Pappadum/Papad, a traditional delight that adds an irresistible crunch to your meals. Crafted with premium-quality lentil flour and aromatic spices, this ready-to-fry papad is a versatile side dish perfect for pairing with rice, curry, or even as a standalone snack.
• Whether you're hosting a dinner party or enjoying a family meal, Suvai Suvai Papadum elevates every dining experience with its rich flavor and crisp texture.

Our Signature Tender Sliced Bak Kwa is made with the finest pork, and marinated with precious Chinese herbs including ginseng, wolfberry, with no preservatives added in the manufacturing process. These mouth-watering Bak Kwa are grilled to perfection.
500g packet of bak kwa comes with a reusable woven bag.
1kg packet Bak Kwa comes with a reusable woven bag.

metaData.Key Information:
- Kozhikoden's Special Murukku is a crispy and savory snack made from rice flour and spices
- It is a popular snack in Kerala, India, and is known for its unique flavor and texture
- The murukku is typically deep-fried or baked until golden brown, and it is often served with tea or coffee
metaData.Storage Information: store in a cool dry place

tags.name: Marketplace
tags.tagLine: You want it, we got it!

metaData.Key Information:
- The papad is a thin Indian wafer, sometimes described as a cracker or flatbread
- It is usually made from dried lentils eaten fried or roasted
- It is served as an accompaniment to an Indian meal, as a snack and as croutons in soups, Papads are thin wafers made of urad dal
